# Washington My Health My Data Act

Jurisdiction: United States - Washington
Region: US-WA
Citation: My Health My Data Act
Authority: Washington State Legislature / Attorney General
Source URL: https://app.leg.wa.gov/RCW/default.aspx?cite=19.373
Topics: sensitive_data, consent, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, marketing_opt_out, retention_deletion
Keywords: My Health My Data Act, consumer health data, Washington, geofence, consent

## Summary
Washington consumer health data law with consent, rights, deletion, sharing restrictions, and geofencing limits.

## Key compliance obligations
- Identify consumer health data broadly, including inferred health data.
- Obtain consent for collection/sharing and authorization for sale where required.
- Support access, deletion, and consent-withdrawal workflows.
